forgotPassword.title: Reset Your Password

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

hero.title: Expiry tracking that drives action
hero.subtitle: Lifo helps food retailers turn expiration data into clear next steps, before it becomes waste.
hero.subtitle2: Lifo shows your team exactly which food products need attention so you can discount, donate, or sell before it's too late.

badge.text: Enjoy a one month free trial

expiryTracking.title: Expiration Tracking for POS Retailers
expiryTracking.description: See exactly which products expire when. Not just total stock counts. Know if 20 units expire in 2 days or 15 expire next week.

predictiveAlerts.title: Actionable Expiration Alerts
predictiveAlerts.description: Get notified before products expire with clear next steps. Discount, donate, or prioritize for sale before it becomes waste.

timeSaving.title: Time Saving
timeSaving.description: Set shelf life rules once per category and Lifo tracks expiry dates automatically for every future delivery. No daily re-entry.

compatibility.title: Square Integration
compatibility.description: Connect your POS account in one click. Products, categories, and sales data sync automatically. No duplicate entry.

businessStats.title: Maximize Your Profits, Minimize Your Losses
businessStats.subtitle: See the real impact lifo has on businesses like yours
businessStats.disclaimer: Results may vary. Based on average customer data over 12 months.

revenue.label: Revenue Increase
revenue.subtext: Discount and attract customers to help move products quickly before they expire.

lossReduction.label: Loss Reduction
lossReduction.description: Easily reduce waste and save money
lossReduction.subtext: Fewer expired products while doing less inventory management work.

taxCredits.label: Tax Credits
taxCredits.description: From the first month on donations
taxCredits.subtext: Increase your tax-deductible donations by connecting with a non-profit organization.

quickSetup.title: Quick Setup
quickSetup.description: Ready-to-use solution in minutes. We take care of the configuration for you.

freeTrial.title: 30-day Free Trial
freeTrial.description: Test all features with no commitment. Easy cancellation at any time.

support.title: Dedicated Support
support.description: Our team of experts guides you through every step of your journey.

immediateResults.title: Immediate Results
immediateResults.description: Reduce waste and increase profits from the first week of use.

card.title: Ready to transform your inventory management?
card.description: Join lifo to become more resilient and join other stores implementing smart inventory management practices.

featurespage.title: Powerful Features
featurespage.subtitle: Everything you need to turn POS inventory data into batch level expiry intelligence.

dashboard.title: Real-time Dashboard
dashboard.description: Get instant visibility into your inventory by batch. See which products expire this week, next week, and beyond. with clear action flags for discounting, donating, or prioritizing sales. No more guessing from aggregate stock counts.

scanning.title: Square Integration
scanning.description: Connect your POS account with one click. Products, categories, and sales history sync automatically. Your POS catalog becomes your product database. No duplicate entry, no new hardware required.

analytics.title: Performance Analytics
analytics.description: Understand your waste reduction and revenue impact with detailed reporting. Track which products sold versus expired, identify patterns by category, and measure the value you're saving.

ai.title: Automated Batch Creation
ai.description: Set shelf life rules once. "All Dairy gets 14 days, Bakery gets 3" and Lifo automatically creates products for every future delivery. Rules persist forever, so tracking improves automatically over time.

expiry.title: Batch Tracking
expiry.description: Group inventory by expiration date, not just by SKU. See exactly which delivery is at risk and when.

security.title: Data Security
security.description: Enterprise-grade security to protect your business data and customer information.

performance.title: Fast Performance
performance.description: Lightning-fast processing and real-time updates for seamless operations.

tracking.title: Square Integration
tracking.description: Connect your existing POS catalog and sales data in minutes. No new hardware or manual import needed.

timeSaving.title: Time Savings
timeSaving.description: Automate expiry date tracking with category rules. Set it once, and every future delivery is tracked automatically.

collaboration.title: Team Collaboration
collaboration.description: Multi-user support with role-based permissions and team management.

cta.title: Ready to See Your Inventory by Batch?
cta.description: Connect your POS account and start tracking expiry dates by batch in minutes.

pricingpage.title: Choose Your Plan
pricingpage.subtitle: Start with our free trial and scale as you grow. No lock-in, full support included.

common.pricingNote: Pricing is subject to change. All fees are to be confirmed.

freeTrial.title: Free Trial
freeTrial.subtitle: Pilot shops
freeTrial.description: All features, with no limitation, for a 1-month free trial.
freeTrial.sellingPoint: Perfect for testing our solution risk-free

light.title: Light
light.subtitle: Small shops, 1 seat only
light.description: For small shops starting their inventory management journey.

features.0: Maximum 3 months of data in Dashboard

light.sellingPoint: Get started on managing your inventory

pro.title: Pro
pro.subtitle: Bigger shops, 2+ FTE
pro.description: For growing businesses that need team collaboration and advanced features.
pro.sellingPoint: Manage roles in your shop effectively

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.subtitle: For chains
enterprise.description: Tailored solution for multi-location businesses with advanced needs.
enterprise.sellingPoint: Manage multiple POS and get advanced analytics

contactpage.subtitle: We are here to help

support.title: Responsive Support
support.description: Our team typically responds within 24 business hours to all your inquiries.

expertise.title: Dedicated Expertise
expertise.description: Specialists in inventory management to answer your questions.

followup.title: Personalized Follow-up
followup.description: Each request is handled individually with personalized follow-up.

footer.description: Helping POS retailers see exactly which products expire when and take action before it's too late.
